observations.value:
R-mode regression (success signal 1 violated): GET /search?q=item returns HTTP 200 but body contains '

No results found.

' with no results list rendered — a non-empty search query ('item') returns zero results, matching the failure signal 'search results list is empty for a non-empty query'.

R-mode regression + E-mode filter-lost-on-page-change confirmed: GET /list?filter=item&page=2 returns HTTP 200 with data-filter="item" but data-effective-filter="" (body: 'page 2, filter=\'item\', effective_filter=\'\''), while GET /list?filter=item&page=1 correctly shows data-effective-filter="item". The filter parameter is accepted on page 1 but silently dropped (not applied) on page 2. This matches the failure signal 'GET /list page=2 with filter applied returns items without the filter (filter dropped)'.
